text: tried a boxing class today. got my butt kicked. going back next week
anyone else think austin traffic is getting worse or is it just me
good conversation with some really solid people today. grateful for community
boxing class number four. my coach says my footwork is improving. my legs disagree
sparred with a guy named dave today. he is 55 and hits harder than me. respect
sofia sang at her school talent show tonight. you are my sunshine. i am not crying you are crying
april is parkinsons awareness month. young onset is real. i was 35 when i was diagnosed. be kind to people who move a little differently
the bluebonnets on 290 are insane this year. has anyone been to the brenham fields yet
two months of boxing. getting stronger. small wins are still wins
happy mothers day to elena. she does everything and makes it look easy. we are lucky
end of year recital. sofia played recorder. missed a few notes and grinned the whole time. thats my girl
108 degrees in austin. staying inside. the ac is my best friend right now
happy fathers day. being sofias dad is the best thing i have ever done
barton springs with elena and sofia. cold water. best saturday in a long time
happy 4th. grilling in the backyard. sofia is in charge of the lemonade
new person at boxing today. told her it gets easier. hope she comes back
anyone have a good breakfast taco spot near parmer lane. i am tired of my own cooking
first day of 2nd grade. she waved from the door. they grow up too fast
boxing class. six months in. coach says i could have been a contender. i said i still am
cooler weather finally. made pancakes for sofia. smiley face with blueberries
good news from the doctor. stable. i will take stable all day
who is watching the longhorns game today. hook em
halloween. sofia was a dinosaur. elena was a paleontologist. i wore boxing gloves. we won the neighborhood
veterans day. thinking about my grandpa today. he never complained about anything
made chili from scratch. took all afternoon. worth it
thankful for elena. thankful for sofia. thankful for good people and good food and this weird beautiful city
december boxing class. only six of us showed up. we hit harder to make up for it
sofia sang at the holiday concert tonight. front row. looked right at us. good night
merry christmas everyone. hope you are with people who love you
elena and sofia asleep by 10. fireworks from the porch. blanket and quiet. good year. hard year. same thing
happy new year. one resolution. keep showing up
first boxing class of 2025. two new people. good energy in the gym today
started watching that show everyone keeps recommending. fell asleep by episode 2. maybe i am just not a binge watcher
cooked breakfast with sofia this morning. she cracked the eggs. she said i am your sous chef dad. hired on the spot
one year of boxing. 15 more reps than when i started. my right hook is no joke
happy valentines day. sofia made me a card with a dinosaur on it. best valentine i ever got
sparred with marcus at boxing. he caught me with a jab. i slipped the next three. still got reflexes
sofia drew a picture of our family. my hands are big and strong in it. its on the fridge now
bluebonnets are starting. spring in texas is still worth everything
does anyone know if the torchys on burnet is still good or did it go downhill. need tacos
porch. coffee. cardinal on the fence. no phone. best morning
balance beam at boxing today. made it all the way across. coach said nice. dave clapped. i took a bow
grilled chicken tonight. only slightly burned. calling it blackened and moving on
april is parkinsons awareness month. if you are newly diagnosed know that it gets easier to carry. reach out if you need someone to talk to
sofia scored a goal at her soccer game today. she ran to me on the sideline. picked her up with both arms. best moment of the year
led a presentation at work today. felt good to be in the zone. some days everything clicks
happy easter everyone
great workout at the gym today. feeling like myself
recommendation needed. best pizza in north austin. go
good day. sun was out. made it through everything. some days that is the whole victory
